input.label: What Do You Need To Find?

search.query: | inputlookup ssphp_github_repo_ownership_details.csv | eval org_repo='organisation'." | ".'repo_name' | dedup org_repo | table org_repo | sort 0 org_repo

| inputlookup ssphp_github_repo_ownership_details.csv
| eval org_repo='organisation'." | ".'repo_name' | search org_repo=$tkn_org_repo|s$
| table organisation, repo_name, description, visibility, dfe_centrally_owned, archived, default_branch, created, last_updated

| inputlookup ssphp_github_repo_ownership_details.csv
| eval org_repo='organisation'." | ".'repo_name' | search org_repo=$tkn_org_repo|s$
| eval ssphp.service.contacts.cost_centre_owner_email=coalesce('ssphp.service.contacts.cost_centre_owner_email','ssphp.service.contacts.cost_centre_owner_email{}') | fields - ssphp.service.contacts.cost_centre_owner_email{} | fields - org_repo, organisation, repo_name, description, visibility, dfe_centrally_owned, archived, default_branch, created, last_updated, *url*, ssphp.service.cost_centre.account_code, ssphp.service.cost_centre.activity_code, ssphp.service.cost_centre.code, ssphp.service.product_clean, ssphp.service.product_key | table ssphp.service.portfolio, ssphp.service.service_line, ssphp.service.product, ssphp.service.id, contributors_*, ssphp.service.iso, ssphp.service.rolls_up_to, rolls_up_to_manager, *service.contacts*, *cost_centre*, * | rename ssphp.service.* as * | transpose ```| search "row 1"!="null"``` | rename column as Field, "row 1" as Value

| inputlookup ssphp_github_repo_ownership_details.csv
| eval org_repo='organisation'." | ".'repo_name' | eval ssphp.service.contacts.cost_centre_owner_email=coalesce('ssphp.service.contacts.cost_centre_owner_email','ssphp.service.contacts.cost_centre_owner_email{}') | eval ssphp.service.contacts.product_owner_email=split('ssphp.service.contacts.product_owner_email'," ")
| fields organisation, repo_name, description, visibility, dfe_centrally_owned, archived, default_branch, created, last_updated, *
| eval owner_list=mvappend('contributors_dfe_email','rolls_up_to_manager','ssphp.service.rolls_up_to,','ssphp.service.contacts.cost_centre_owner_email','ssphp.service.contacts.financial_business_partner_email','ssphp.service.contacts.hosting_provider_email','ssphp.service.contacts.hosting_support_email','ssphp.service.contacts.product_owner_email','ssphp.service.iso') ```| search owner_list="Adaobi.IFEACHOR@education.gov.uk Claire.JONES@education.gov.uk"``` | makemv delim=" " owner_list
| eval owner_list=mvfilter(!match('owner_list',"null")) | eval owner_list=mvfilter(!match('owner_list',"Unassigned"))
| stats values(owner_list) as owner_list | mvexpand owner_list | eval owner_list=lower(owner_list) | dedup owner_list | sort 0 owner_list

| inputlookup ssphp_github_repo_ownership_details.csv
| eval org_repo='organisation'." | ".'repo_name' | eval ssphp.service.contacts.cost_centre_owner_email=coalesce('ssphp.service.contacts.cost_centre_owner_email','ssphp.service.contacts.cost_centre_owner_email{}') | eval ssphp.service.contacts.product_owner_email=split('ssphp.service.contacts.product_owner_email'," ")
| fields organisation, repo_name, description, visibility, dfe_centrally_owned, archived, default_branch, created, last_updated, *
| eval owner_list=mvappend('contributors_dfe_email','rolls_up_to_manager','ssphp.service.rolls_up_to,','ssphp.service.contacts.cost_centre_owner_email','ssphp.service.contacts.financial_business_partner_email','ssphp.service.contacts.hosting_provider_email','ssphp.service.contacts.hosting_support_email','ssphp.service.contacts.product_owner_email','ssphp.service.iso') ```| search owner_list="Adaobi.IFEACHOR@education.gov.uk Claire.JONES@education.gov.uk"``` | makemv delim=" " owner_list
| eval owner_list=mvfilter(!match('owner_list',"null")) | eval owner_list=mvfilter(!match('owner_list',"Unassigned")) | eval owner_list=mvdedup('owner_list')
| table organisation, repo_name, description, visibility, dfe_centrally_owned, archived, default_branch, created, last_updated, owner_list | search owner_list=$tkn_repo_owner|s$ | eventstats count

table.fields: organisation, repo_name, description, visibility, dfe_centrally_owned, archived, default_branch, created, last_updated, owner_list

search.query:
| inputlookup ssphp_bdmc_resource_groups.csv
| lookup ssphp_bdmc_fbp.csv portfolio, service_line, product OUTPUT id, cost_centre_owner, financial_business_partner_email, hosting_provider_email, product_owner_email | lookup ssphp_user_service_defaults.csv ssphp.service.id as id OUTPUT ssphp.service.iso
| table resourceGroup, tenantId, subscriptionId, portfolio, service_line, product, cost_centre_code, id, cost_centre_owner, financial_business_partner_email, hosting_provider_email, product_owner_email, ssphp.service.iso

| stats values(resourceGroup) as resourceGroup
| mvexpand resourceGroup | sort 0 resourceGroup

| search resourceGroup=$tkn_rg|s$
| stats values(tenantId) as tenantId, values(subscriptionId) as subscriptionId, values(portfolio) as portfolio, values(service_line) as service_line, values(product) as product

| search resourceGroup=$tkn_rg|s$
| table cost_centre_code, id, cost_centre_owner, financial_business_partner_email, hosting_provider_email, product_owner_email, ssphp.service.iso | transpose
| rename column as Fields, "row 1" as Value | eval Value=if('Value'="null",null(), 'Value') | where isnotnull(Value)

| eval owner_list=mvappend(split('financial_business_partner_email'," "),split('hosting_provider_email'," "),split('product_owner_email'," "),split('ssphp.service.iso'," ")), owner_list=mvfilter(!match(owner_list,"null"))
| stats values(owner_list) as all_owners | mvexpand all_owners

| eval owner_list=mvappend(split('financial_business_partner_email'," "),split('hosting_provider_email'," "),split('product_owner_email'," "),split('ssphp.service.iso'," ")), owner_list=mvfilter(!match(owner_list,"null"))
| search owner_list=$tkn_rg_owner|s$
| table resourceGroup, tenantId, subscriptionId, portfolio, service_line, product, cost_centre_code, id, cost_centre_owner, financial_business_partner_email, hosting_provider_email, product_owner_email, ssphp.service.iso | eventstats count

table.fields: resourceGroup, tenantId, subscriptionId, portfolio, service_line, product, cost_centre_code, id, cost_centre_owner, financial_business_partner_email, hosting_provider_email, product_owner_email, ssphp.service.iso

search.query:
| inputlookup ssphp_bdmc.csv where (resource_type="Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines microsoft.compute/virtualmachines" OR resource_type="microsoft.compute/virtualmachines") | eval resource_type="Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines"
| lookup local=true ssphp_bdmc_fbp.csv product_key OUTPUT account_code, activity_code, cost_centre_code, cost_centre_owner, cost_centre_title, financial_business_partner_email, hosting_provider_email, hosting_support_email, id, portfolio, product, product_clean, product_owner_email, service_line
| fields - product_clean, product_key
| eval vm_id=mvindex(mvreverse(split(resource_id,"/")),0) | stats values(vm_id) as vm_id | mvexpand vm_id

table.fields: resourceGroup, tenantId, subscriptionId, portfolio, service_line, product, cost_centre_code, id, cost_centre_owner, financial_business_partner_email, hosting_provider_email, product_owner_email, ssphp.service.iso
